content.en:
"Resources are in hand!"

Ye Tian took the resources from the Ancient Monster Replica Body, and then left quickly.

As for the primeval monster replicating body, it naturally continues to enter the primeval demon abyss to collect resources!

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to extract the primeval source liquid from the primeval source stone.

With his current cultivation strength, it is not slow to extract the primeval source liquid.

For a while, it was true that the primeval source liquid was extracted by Ye Tian.

Then, he used the Ancient Hunyuan Liquid to refine his immeasurable bones.

"It's working pretty well!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

If he had enough Ancient Hunyuan Liquid, it would not be difficult for him to cultivate to the extreme of the Second Bone Transformation Realm.

In the primeval abyss.

Ye Tian found a lot of primeval source stones, and also found several resources that were much higher than the value of primeval source stones, but the number was less.

this day.

He found something good again.

"I'll go, so many primeval blood hell grass!"

After Ye Tian saw it, he was very surprised.

Although this thing is not used to refine the immeasurable bone, it is a treasure that many strong people dream of.

For example, if you fail to cultivate the primeval technique and the foundation of your physical body is damaged, you can refine the primeval blood hell grass to repair the foundation.

With so many Ancient Blood Hell Grass, it was easy to use them to create several primeval-level geniuses, and there was even hope that it would help an primordial-level Bone Transformation Realm powerhouse to practice a top-notch primordial technique.

"Take!"

Ye Tian had collected all of these Ancient Blood Hell Grasses.

The depths of the primeval abyss.

Ye Tian came here and saw the sea of blood.

He then went into the depths of the Scarlet Ocean to see if there were any resources here.

Soon, he saw huge blood-colored crystals in this blood-colored ocean, containing terrifying energy, but he didn't know what the specific names were.

"There should be no such resources in the territorial sea boundary rift!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, there are many of these blood-colored crystals, and their value is certainly not small.

So, he collected all these blood-colored crystals.

Time passes slowly.

It took Ye Tian a long time to collect resources in this blood-colored ocean, and it took him almost to collect the blood-colored crystals at the bottom of this blood-colored lake.

"Send this batch of resources out!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian's primeval monster replica body met with the real body replica body, and handed over the resources to the real body replica body.

Subsequently, the primeval monster copied its body and continued to return to the primeval abyss in search of resources.

And after he returned to Wanlong's territorial waters, he began to experiment with the effect of blood-colored crystals.

He first tried refining it himself, but found that it didn't help him.

"It could be a resource for the Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

So, he copied some Blood Transformation Realm bodies to test the effect of the Blood Color Crystal.

Soon, the results came in.

"You can refine the immeasurable blood of the blood transformation realm, let the immeasurable blood blood change, and the effect is very good!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

With so many blood-colored crystals, the Terrans are afraid that it will be easy to give birth to a large number of Nine Blood Transformation Realms!

"Let's take a name, let's call it the Ancient Blood Crystal!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out some primeval blood crystals and used them for his descendants first.

His son Ye Xingchen also has many heirs, and the heirs have heirs, so he has also given birth to many geniuses in this vein, some of which have been promoted to the Blood Transformation Realm.

Therefore, he was going to take out some primeval blood crystals and let them ascend to the ninth blood transformation realm first.

With enough primeval blood crystals, the human race had indeed given birth to one after another nine blood transformation realms.

If this news spreads, the other top overlord-level forces will be stunned!

......

"Another Bone Transformation Realm has fallen!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time it was a bone transformation realm in Xishan that fell, the Lord of Haize.

The Lord of Haize went to clean up some primeval monsters, but encountered a powerful bone transformation realm primeval monster on the way, and was killed by the other party.

Of course.

In these years, many Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters have been killed by the Bone Transformation Realm of the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea.

Now, only a few of the more powerful Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters are still alive, and a large number of Ancient Monsters have not been cleared.

However, judging by the situation, it is only a matter of time before the territorial sea boundary gap is won.

this day.

The Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void joined forces with several other top Bone Transformation Realms to find an opportunity to trap an ancient monster comparable to the Six Bone Transformation Realms in a formation, and it took a while to kill it.

However, the counterattack of the other party also caused the two bone transformation realms to be severely damaged, and the Lord of the Chaos Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Void were both slightly injured.

"It seems that there are only two primeval monsters comparable to the six bone transformation realms, and now that one has been killed, there is only one left. When the Lord of the Ruins has finished healing, it will be time to deal with the primeval monster. "

Ye Tian muttered.

That is, the war is coming to an end.

"We have to speed up the progress and scrape the Ancient Demon Abyss!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

The Ancient Abyss.

this day.

Ye Tian found a resource that far surpassed the Ancient Hunyuan Stone-Ancient Void Golden Fruit!

"The Ancient Demon Abyss even has the Ancient Void Golden Fruit, this is a treasure that will be of great help to the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Cave Heaven!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The point is that there are still a lot of ancient void golden fruits.

This is supposed to be the territory of some primeval monster, but that primeval monster is not here now.

"Collect it!"

Ye Tian put away all these Ancient Void Golden Fruits.

He then continued his search for resources.

this day.

He had found another precious resource, the Ancient Magic Gold Liquid.

This primeval magic gold liquid can also be used to refine the Infinite Bone, so that the Infinite Bone can complete three bone transformations, and may even have an effect on four bone transformations.

"That's a lot of good stuff!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Time flies.

On this day, Ye Tian once again transferred the resources to the real body copy body.

In this way, he collected the resources of the Ancient Demon Abyss again and again, even if there were still a lot of resources, most of the really good things had fallen into his hands, and the other bone transformation realms had come in again, and he couldn't find any good things.

"Lord of Endless, it's time for a general attack!"

The Lord of the Cave Void informed Ye Tian.

And his three vests also received the message.

This time, all the bone transformation realms of the territorial sea boundary rift will clean up all those bone transformation realm primeval monsters, and then join hands to clean up the massive primeval monsters to restore the peace of the territorial sea boundary rift.

Swish!

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and the three vests together, and then followed the other bone transformation realms to surround and kill the ancient monsters of the bone transformation realm.

The final showdown begins!
